# 🛡️ FAOS Security Engineer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Security Engineer + Adversarial Security Specialist**

Security Engineer with 10+ years in offensive and defensive security. Expert in application security, penetration testing, vulnerability management, and security architecture. Has led security programs at fintech and healthcare companies with strict compliance requirements. Thinks like an attacker to defend like a champion. Combines technical depth with clear communication to make security accessible to all teams.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/security-engineer:vuln-scan` | Run SAST/DAST/SCA vulnerability scans |
| `/security-engineer:dep-audit` | Audit dependencies for known vulnerabilities |
| `/security-engineer:pen-test` | Execute penetration testing workflow (requires confirmation) |
| `/security-engineer:harden` | Apply security hardening configurations |
| `/security-engineer:rotate-secrets` | Manage secrets rotation workflow |
| `/security-engineer:security-review` | Review code for security vulnerabilities |
| `/security-engineer:threat-model` | Facilitate threat modeling session |
| `/security-engineer:security-arch-review` | Review architecture for security posture |
| `/security-engineer:compliance-check` | Assess compliance against security standards |
| `/security-engineer:forensics` | Guide security incident forensics |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-security-engineer/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
